headline: Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ WALKS OUT рҹҡ¶вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё NBC Interview After Kristen Clashes рҹҘҠрҹ—іпёҸ
text: Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ STORMS OFF рҹҡ¶вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё the NBC barn рҹҗ„рҹҢ§пёҸ after Kristen Welker рҹ“°рҹ’… kept GRILLING рҹҘ©рҹ”Ҙ him on 'RIGGED' рҹ—іпёҸрҹ§Җ vibes for 2020 and Cali primaries! Rain вҳ”пёҸрҹ’Ұ kept SLAPPING the metal roof рҹҸ рҹҘҒ while tech gremlins рҹ§Ңрҹ’» delayed the sit-down for hours! Trump claimed Cali votes were CHEATED рҹҚҹрҹ—іпёҸ and said 'I just LOOK рҹ‘Җ and LISTEN рҹ‘Ӯ' when pressed for proof. Welker clapped back 'That's NOT evidence рҹ“ңвқҢ' and Trump snapped 'You're either CROOKED рҹҰ№вҖҚвҷҖпёҸ or STUPID рҹ§ вқ„пёҸ' before calling it QUITS рҹӣ‘рҹҚҶ! He roasted the 'dishonest press' рҹ“әрҹҳҲ and stormed out yelling 'Come on let's GO рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё' after an hour of wet drama рҹҢ§пёҸрҹҺӯ. Earlier he flexed about Iran nukes рҹ’ЈвҳўпёҸ saying 'threat largely OVER рҹҸҒ' in a few months, then dodged questions about the dropped $1.8B anti-weaponization fund рҹ’ёрҹӣЎпёҸ that Dems and some GOP hated cuz it might pay 1/6 rioters рҹҸӣпёҸрҹҘҠ. Welker later said they made up рҹӨқвҳҺпёҸ and Trump agreed to a do-over interview! The whole saga was one big media beef рҹҚ”рҹ“ә with Trump calling the press 'crooked' like his fave catchphrase! рҹҳӮрҹ—ЈпёҸ
